content.en:
"There seems to be something special about this dark holy place!"

The Holy Ancestor muttered.

"Something special indeed!"

The Ancestor of Destruction was also discovered.

Each Dark Holy Land has a special cultivation system, such as the Dark Destruction Domain, absorbing the destruction energy of countless areas of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and using destruction as a cultivation system, so the Dark Destruction Domain is prevalent in destruction, coupled with their natural bloodline advantage, as long as they destroy everything, they can grow.

The Dark Sanctuary is a holy place for cultivators, focusing on cultivation and comprehending the forbidden avenue.

But this third Dark Sanctuary is completely different, and the rules here are very special.

"The rules here are biased in favor of the soul!"

Holy Ancestor was surprised.

Soul!

The other ancestors probed one by one and deduced it.

Indeed, the rules of this dark sanctuary are in favor of the soul.

It is normal for some worlds to favor the soul rule, but this entire Dark Holy Land is biased towards the soul, which means that the mainstream cultivation path of this Dark Holy Land is the soul path.

The mainstream of the Dark Destruction Domain is the way of the bloodline, and the mainstream of the Dark Destruction Domain is the way of the flesh, for example, the cultivation of the domain ancestor depends on refining the domain body.

And the mainstream is the soul, so you must improve the soul realm in order to improve your cultivation.

"Interesting, this mainstream is a dark holy place for souls, and many of the treasures born in it may be treasures that can improve the soul realm, and may be able to give birth to treasures that can temper the souls of our ancestors. It is difficult for our physical body to improve, but if we refine our soul, our strength will increase to a certain extent!"

The Ancestor of Time and Space said excitedly.

The other Ancestors were also very excited, but it was a pity that they couldn't get in, otherwise, they would immediately break into this third Dark Holy Land.

"What's the name of this dark sanctuary?"

Many ancestors were ready to name this holy place.

"Let's call it the Dark Souls!"

The Holy Ancestor casually took the name.

"The Holy Ancestor actually named this Dark Holy Land, so it's called the Dark Soul Domain!"

The other Ancestors agreed.

The location of the Dark Soul Domain was confirmed, and teleportation locations were set up here one by one.

On the side of the Dark Destruction Domain, the Space-Time Ancestor established a permanent space-time portal.

On the side of the Dark Sanctuary, the Realm Ancestor condensed a branch tower of the Battle Boundary Tower, and opened up the permission, allowing it to pass through the Battle Boundary Tower.

It's just that if you used the Battle Boundary Tower to shuttle between the two places before, it consumed too much energy, so the Boundary Ancestor turned off this energy, resulting in the War Boundary Tower not being able to be used to hurry, and only the Invincible Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate had a little permission, and he could temporarily shuttle between the two places, but he couldn't leave the range of the Battle Boundary Tower too far.

It was through this authority that the original Ancient Sea Ancestor came to the Xuanxu Saint Realm to help Ye Tian.

But now, the permission has been released, and anyone can travel between the two places through the Battle Boundary Tower, but this time it is only temporarily opened, sending the half-step domain ancestors of the Dark Holy Land over.

On the Eternal Sect's side, a huge teleportation circle was also built for the Eternal Sect's half-step domain ancestor to come over.

In fact, the Ancestors could also send the Half-Step Domain Ancestors over one by one, but the speed was too slow.

The Ancestors couldn't send too many people over at once, because thoughts couldn't wrap everyone up, after all, crossing such a long distance was very restrictive, and if they forcibly sent people over, those half-step Domain Ancestors would disintegrate into nothingness halfway through.

Just like the Sacred Continent that sent the Peerless Domain Ancestors to the Dark Forbidden Domain Frontier in the first place, the Ancestors also sent the Peerless Domain Ancestors one by one, and there was no way to send them over together.

Otherwise, the Ancestor Ancestor would carry countless half-step domain ancestors, and he would be able to easily cross the endless territory, which would not be realistic.

The Ancestors themselves could travel through the endless time and space and descend to any place in the Dark Forbidden Realm with a single thought, it was their own thoughts that were immortal, and the physical body was too powerful for others to do.

Soon.

A half-step domain ancestor of the Dark Sanctuary came to the Dark Soul Domain through the Battle Realm Tower.

Ye Tian also went directly to the Dark Soul Domain through the Battle Ancestor Realm of the Xuanxu Realm, which was also the Realm Ancestor who let go of his authority, so it was very convenient.

Bang!!!!!

Under the leadership of Ye Tian's body, the 100,000 Domain Ancestors of the Human Race descended to the edge of the Dark Soul Domain.

But what Ye Tian appeared was that many ancestors were surprised.

There is no superior domain ancestor peak realm!

They saw Ye Tian's cultivation realm, but Ye Tiancai didn't have a high-level domain ancestor before!

It's only been a long time, and Ye Tian's cultivation has actually reached the peak realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, and this strength has improved too quickly!

The ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain all wanted to destroy Ye Tian, but now that many of the Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain were present, they naturally couldn't do such a thing.

"Let the Half-Step Domain Ancestors in!"

The Ancestors spoke.

Whoa!!!

Countless half-step domain ancestors were thrown into the Dark Soul Domain by the Peerless Domain Ancestors.

Ye Tian also waved his hand, wrapped the 100,000 human geniuses, and sent them into the Dark Soul Domain, and sent them to a remote area, not to the core area.

The background of the human race is still lower, and the innate racial advantage of the human race is not large, so there is no need to compete with other forces in the half-step domain ancestor stage, so it is okay to develop in remote areas.

Besides, with his copy body, it is also very easy to help the human race rise in the Dark Soul Domain, and it doesn't need any good territory.

It didn't take long for countless half-step domain ancestors to pour into the Dark Soul Domain.

And this ancestor cultivator is here, and he hasn't left here.

They even comprehended the rules of the Dark Soul Domain, which was also a kind of cultivation for them.

------------------

Dark Souls, a remote territory.

The 100,000 half-step domain ancestor geniuses of the human race descended here, and they began to familiarize themselves with the environment here, and occupied a domain realm for the first time.

Ye Tian had already told them that after entering the Dark Soul Domain, the human race must be condensed, and at the beginning, they should work hard to cultivate, and not run around.

It has been a long time since the birth of the Dark Soul Domain, so many races have appeared here now, and the cultivation system has taken shape.

"Soul Dao!"

The Terrans have collected a lot of information, and they have also collected the cultivation body type of this world.

The cultivators of this world do not attach importance to the physical body, but only to the soul, believing that the soul is the foundation, and that the physical body is destroyed and can be completely reunited, and if the soul is annihilated, then it will really fall.

Ye Tian saw the soul path and immediately felt that this path had a high potential.

Moreover, if you want to become an Ancestor in the Dark Sanctuary, you must also cultivate the Soul Dao.
